'''Petdur Squadron''' was a unit of [[Mugaari]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]]. They participated—and were destroyed—in the [[Defense of Outpost D-34|First Battle of Javin]] against [[Outpost D-34|D-34]].<ref name="TIE" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
